positive: Minimalist symmetrical illustration of a cosmic fox silhouette, sitting amidst glowing crescent moons and stylized constellations. The scene features deep indigo and vibrant cyan gradients contrasting against pure white negative space. The fox has an ethereal, elegant pose, surrounded by geometric star patterns and flowing cosmic dust wisps. Highly detailed vector art style, clean lines, perfect symmetry, designed for t-shirt print on black background. Clean silhouettes, high contrast, graphic design quality, volumetric lighting, centered composition.
negative: blur, grainy, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, lowres, cropped, artifacts, out of frame, complex background, muddy colors
